_note: Real data. Stats are single-best-season totals from the CFBD API (collegefootballdata.com), pulled via scripts/fetch-football.mjs; DE/DT and CB/S splits hand-verified (CFBD roster only gives coarse DL/DB). Defensive box scores exist in CFBD from 2016 on, so the era wheel starts at 2016. honors[] is intentionally empty pending a separate award-page pass.
